title: Clidemia scabrosa
taxonomy: Clidemia scabrosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. This family is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Clidemia scabrosa itself is a species within the genus Clidemia, which is a group of plants that are native to Central and South America. The genus Clidemia is further classified within the family Melastomataceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. The classification of Clidemia scabrosa reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants within the Melastomataceae family.
